channel.title: Wayland on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Wayland on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: hyprwm/Hyprland
item.description: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn’t sacrifice on its looks.

item.title: peteonrails/voxtype
item.description: Voice-to-text with push-to-talk for Wayland compositors

item.title: caelestia-dots/shell
item.description: ‼️ No waybar here ‼️

item.title: apognu/tuigreet
item.description: Graphical console greeter for greetd

item.title: SeaDve/Kooha
item.description: Elegantly record your screen

item.title: quickshell-mirror/quickshell
item.description: Flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick, for Wayland and X11

item.title: Alexays/Waybar
item.description: Highly customizable Wayland bar for Sway and Wlroots based compositors. ✌️ 🎉

item.title: emersion/mako
item.description: A lightweight Wayland notification daemon

item.title: Axenide/Ax-Shell
item.description: A hackable shell for Hyprland, powered by Fabric.

item.title: localdesktop/localdesktop.github.io
item.description: Local Desktop helps you run a desktop Linux environment on your Android device.

item.title: dunst-project/dunst
item.description: Lightweight and customizable notification daemon

item.title: LGFae/swww
item.description: A Solution to your Wayland Wallpaper Woes

item.title: cage-kiosk/cage
item.description: A Wayland kiosk

item.title: emersion/slurp
item.description: Select a region in a Wayland compositor

item.title: coastalwhite/lemurs
item.description: A customizable TUI display/login manager written in Rust 🐒

item.title: swaywm/wlroots
item.description: A modular Wayland compositor library

item.title: andre-brandao/gpui-shell
item.description: Wayland desktop shell and status bar in Rust with GPUI, featuring a modular bar, launcher, and control center for Hyprland and Niri.

item.title: emersion/grim
item.description: Grab images from a Wayland compositor

item.title: arran4/shineyshot
item.description: A simple screenshotting tool with several user modes
